positive: A whimsical, minimalist celestial scene. A central silhouette of a stylized crescent moon and a ring of glowing, nebula-infused stars are set against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient. Floating among the stars are simple, abstract silhouettes of geometric planets and wisps of comet tails, rendered in soft gold and ethereal silver ink. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and highly scalable, emphasizing clean lines, strong contrast, and high visual impact suitable for screen printing on fabric. Style: Detailed vector art, linocut aesthetic, astronomical blueprint.
